g.text: M1: CUDA Execution Model & Thread Hierarchy
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Legend: ▶ sql_table = Data Structures ▶ class = Modules/Classes ▶ rectangle = Concepts ▶ → = Data Flow ▶ ⟹ = Dependency
Memory Scale: Register: 1-64 bytes/thread Shared: 1-48 KB/block Global: MBs to GBs L2 Cache: 4-6 MB (device-wide)
Thread Scale: Warp: 32 threads Block: up to 1024 threads Grid: millions of threads SM: 2048 max threads (A100)
Time Scale: Register access: ~1 cycle Shared memory: ~20 cycles L1/L2 cache: ~100 cycles Global memory: 400-800 cycles PCIe transfer: microseconds
uint32_t activeMask | +0x08 | 4 bytes | Bitmask of active threads
__global__ void saxpy_kernel( int n, float a, const float* x, float* y ) Performs y[i] = a*x[i] + y[i]
dim3 compute_grid(int n) Returns optimal grid dimensions
void launch_saxpy( int n, float a, const float* d_x, float* d_y, cudaStream_t stream ) Launches SAXPY kernel with auto config
int compute_occupancy( int blockSize, size_t sharedMem ) Returns occupancy percentage
int PADDING | +0x08 | 4 bytes | Bank conflict avoidance
size_t pitch | +0x14 | 8 bytes | Row pitch for 2D
int bytesTransferred | +0x04 | 4 bytes | Total bytes moved
__global__ void naive_transpose( const float* input, float* output, int width, int height ) Non-coalesced baseline
__global__ void tiled_transpose( const float* input, float* output, int width, int height ) Shared memory tiled version
void benchmark_transpose( int size, int iterations ) Compares naive vs tiled performance
int BLOCK_SIZE | +0x00 | 4 bytes | Must be power of 2
bool useShared | +0x0C | 1 byte | Use shared memory
int blockSize | +0x0C | 4 bytes | Power of 2, max 1024
int binsPerBlock | +0x04 | 4 bytes | Shared memory bins
__global__ void blelloch_scan( T* data, T* partials, int n ) Work-efficient O(n) scan
__global__ void hillis_steele( T* data, int n ) O(n log n) but simpler
__global__ void global_histogram( const uchar* input, int* histogram, int n, int numBins ) Global atomic approach
__global__ void privatized_histogram( const uchar* input, int* histogram, int n, int numBins ) Shared memory privatization
__global__ void aggregate_histograms( const int* localHists, int* globalHist, int numBlocks, int numBins ) Final reduction step
StreamPipeline* create_pipeline( int numStreams, int priority ) Allocates streams and events
void enqueue_op( StreamPipeline* pipeline, OperationType type, void* data, size_t size, int streamIdx ) Adds operation to pipeline
void sync_pipeline( StreamPipeline* pipeline ) Waits for all streams
StreamPool* pool_init( int poolSize, int maxPending ) Creates stream pool
int acquire_stream( StreamPool* pool ) Returns available stream index
void release_stream( StreamPool* pool, int streamIdx ) Returns stream to pool
int registers | +0x5C | 4 bytes | Registers per thread
size_t sharedMem | +0x60 | 8 bytes | Static + dynamic shared
float occupancy | +0x68 | 4 bytes | Active warps / max warps
void start_profiling( const ProfilerConfig* config ) Starts Nsight capture
KernelMetrics get_kernel_metrics( const char* kernelName ) Returns collected metrics
float calculate_occupancy( int blockSize, size_t sharedMem, int registers ) Computes theoretical occupancy
BottleneckType classify_bottleneck( float arithIntensity, float ridgePoint ) Returns COMPUTE or MEMORY
